title: lathyrus clymenum subsp. tenuifolius
intro: Lathyrus clymenum subsp. tenuifolius, also known as the slender meadow pea, is a flowering plant in the pea family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural diuretic, and has been used to treat various health issues, including kidney stones and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Lathyrus clymenus subsp. tenuifolius include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support urinary health and reduce symptoms of related conditions.
